creator: majo-bugs.freebsd.org@cerny.sk
text:
(In reply to Yasuhito FUTATSUKI from comment #6)

>     rm -rf /usr/ports/distfiles/go/devel_gitaly
> 
> is sufficient for deve/gitaly

Yes. But today I also had to clean distfiles for gitlab-elasticsearch-indexer and then had a problem with gitlab-agent. So I ended up doing:

    rm -rf /usr/ports/distfiles/go
